text: The Allegra at Shreveport project is a federally assisted construction project subject to the Davis Bacon Act which requires the payment of prevailing wage rates (as determined by the U.S. Department of Labor) to all laborers and mechanics working on the project.   To ensure compliance, certified payrolls using the WH-347 federal form that include all onsite laborers and mechanics must be submitted to the Davis Bacon Compliance firm Oryx Compliance, LLC.
